notes: bytes 1..2 decode as little-endian local ordinals 0x00ec/0x00ed/0x00f5/0x00f8/0x00f9
0x3e-prefixed tails in companion up/right point back to owner ordinals with mode bytes 0x02 / 0x01
0xa4-prefixed owner tails likely encode owner-side state/layout/metadata, not target ordinal
0x3e-prefixed down tails likely point into shared list-root fabric; exact id still unresolved
0x1aec0104 is stable back/escape ref outside the compact ordinal family
